ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Head, Body, Weapon) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the item (e.g., Basic, Rare) */,
  "level_required" INTEGER /* Level required to use the item */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the item in in-game currency */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's image */,
  "item_attributes" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional item attributes (e.g., attack power, defense, special abilities) */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category for easier navigation (e.g., Weapons, Armor, Accessories) */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory for more detailed categorization */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "item_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the inventory */,
  "item_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last modified */,
  "item_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  "item_tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is tradable */,
  "item_consume_on_use" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is consumed upon use */,
  "item_stackable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item can be stacked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "player_gold" INTEGER /* Amount of in-game currency the player has */,
  "player_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the player account was created */,
  "player_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the players table */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the game_items table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items the player has */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is equipped */,
  "acquired_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was acquired by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the players table (seller) */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the players table (buyer) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the game_items table */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the item was traded */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin action */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the admins table */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., add_item, update_item, delete_item) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the game_items table */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the admin */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., developer, moderator) */,
  "admin_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the admin account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
